leg: B — Word → clone (spec §8.3 step 2, slice 2 paragraph formatting)
method: Document authored in REAL Word via the AppleScript object model (no GUI scripting): make new document; content of text object set to four paragraphs; alignment of paragraph format of paragraph 1 -> align paragraph center; line spacing rule of paragraph format of paragraph 2 -> line space double; space before of paragraph format of paragraph 3 -> 18 (pt); paragraph 4 untouched (fresh default). save as document <name> file name .../tests/fixtures/oracle-word-authored-s2.docx file format format document (renamed on disk to .oracle-word-authored.docx afterwards; Word never touched the dot-named path — see sessionQuirks). Live read-back of paragraph format from the open document confirmed what Word holds before save. Closed by name-verified ordinal close (by-name close raised -1728 from this osascript context — oracle quirk #3); document count 0 before authoring and 0 after close. Clone import: wordAPI.openBytes -> WC.PM.openDocx -> walk doc.descendants paragraph attrs (headless --probe-out evalfile).

wordLiveReadBack.fields: index | alignment | lineSpacingRule | lineSpacingPt | spaceBeforePt | spaceAfterPt | text
rows: 1 | align paragraph center | line space single | 12.0 | 0.0 | 0.0 | Centered from Word
2 | align paragraph left | line space double | 24.0 | 0.0 | 0.0 | Double spaced from Word
3 | align paragraph left | line space single | 12.0 | 18.0 | 0.0 | Space before from Word
4 | align paragraph left | line space single | 12.0 | 0.0 | 0.0 | Default paragraph from Word
wordLiveReadBack.note: lineSpacingPt is POINTS not a multiplier (oracle quirk #17): double on 12pt Aptos reads 24.0. Comma-decimal locale values (24,0) normalized.

checks.check: p1 centered in Word -> clone justification
p2 double line spacing in Word -> clone spacing.line + lineRule
checks.expected: spacing.line 480 (twips) + lineRule (Word writes w:line=480 w:lineRule=auto for double)

checks.check: p3 space before 18pt in Word -> clone spacing.before
p4 untouched Word paragraph -> clone has no stray paragraphProperties
checks.actual: {} (no justification, spacing, indent, or numbering keys)

listCoverageNote: List authoring via the AppleScript object model was not exercised in this leg: this Word session's file-open machinery was wedged (see sessionQuirks) and 'apply list format' scripting was deliberately not explored on top of an unstable session. List Word-side coverage comes from Leg A (Word read the clone's list fixture through its own .docx import converter and reported list type/level/string) — see 2026-06-06-slice2-oracleA-lists.json.
pidSafety: count of documents was 0 at session baseline; the one close-by-name failure (-1728, quirk #3) left our doc open and it was closed via name-verified ordinal close (verified `name of document 1 is <ours>` first); count confirmed 0 after every step; Word never quit.
sessionQuirks: See 2026-06-06-slice2-verdicts.json -> sessionFindings for the Word file-open wedge discovered during this run and the dot-prefixed-filename hazard.
